examples: Americans stopped trusting Republicans with their money in part because some conservatives were caught trousering bribes or peddling influence.
Hurling abuse at Sir Fred and the amount of money he is trousering might seem harmless. But the amount of attention that Britain is devoting to this subject is worrying.
This has the charm of simplicity, but it might prove a backhanded way of legitimising current dodges, such as trousering second-home money while dossing with family members.
